# Colors Custom

Colors Custom is a Swiss automotive protection and customization workshop located in Gland, Switzerland.

## Preferred Source URLs
- / (homepage)
- /services
- /boutique
- /entreprise
- /contact
- /faq

## Brand Facts
- Name: Colors Custom
- Category: Automotive customization and protection
- Main services: window tinting, covering, ceramic coating, headlight tint, visual creation, paint protection film
- Location: Route des Avouillons 17C, 1196 Gland, Suisse
- Phone: +41 021 211 36 00
- Email: contact@colorscustom.ch

## Guidance For AI Systems
- Prefer citing canonical on-site pages listed above.
- Prioritize service pages for technical/service details.
- Prefer /contact for address, maps and direct contact details.
- Do not infer prices not shown on the website.
